ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number in the execution sequence */,
  "test_step" TEXT /* Description of the test step */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Data required to execute the test */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature or component the test case is associated with */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the tester who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was last updated */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case (e.g., Functional, Integration, User Acceptance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test was run */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester executing the test */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test in seconds */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed (e.g., Staging, Production) */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number or version of the application being tested */,
  "test_case_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case being executed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., Pass, Fail, In Progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tester */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the tester (e.g., QA Engineer, Tester) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the tester belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tester account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tester account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Staging, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this environment is used for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
